name: Della's Chocolate Cordial Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Place both kinds of chocolate chips into the top of a double boiler. Add shortening and melt.
2. Cool to 78°F.
3. Cream butter with sugar. Add milk, vanilla, and almond extract. If mixture is too sticky, add up to 1/4 cup additional sugar.
4. Mold a small amount of this mixture around each cherry, covering completely.
5. Cover and chill.
6. When ready to dip into chocolate coating, heat cooled chocolate to 88°F over warm water, maintaining temperature while dipping.
7. Drop each covered cherry, one at a time, into chocolate; roll to coat completely and remove with a fork.
8. Draw the fork across the rim of the pan to remove excess chocolate.
9. Drop from the fork, upside down, onto waxed paper, swirling a thread of chocolate from the fork across the top for a decorative touch.
10. Chill 20 minutes. Store in a cool place (1-2 days) to allow cherry covering to liquefy and form "cordial".
